title: eriosema robustum
intro: Eriosema robustum, also known as Robust Eriosema, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eriosema robustum include treating fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
